class.name: CassieSurfacePatch
class.brief_description: Triangle-projection patch built from an imported [Mesh], accelerated by a [code]DynamicBVH[/code].
class.description:
Wraps a Godot [Mesh] and answers point-projection queries in the [Dictionary] shape the CASSIE beautifier consumes via [member CassieSketchContext.project_on_patch_callback]. BVH-backed from day one to keep ~50 µs per query at the 100k+-triangle scale typical for production avatar meshes.
[codeblock] var patch := CassieSurfacePatch.new() patch.mesh = preload("res://my_base.glb").instantiate().mesh patch.patch_id = 7 var ctx := CassieSketchContext.new() ctx.project_on_patch_callback = patch.get_callback() [/codeblock]

method.name: get_callback
method.description: Returns a [Callable] bound to [method project]. Plug straight into [member CassieSketchContext.project_on_patch_callback].

method.name: get_triangle_count
method.description: Returns the number of non-degenerate triangles after ingest. Zero-area triangles are dropped silently.

method.name: project
method.description: Returns the closest point on the patch to [param position] as [code]{ "on_surface": bool, "patch_id": int, "projected": Vector3, "normal": Vector3, "distance": float }[/code]. [code]on_surface[/code] is [code]true[/code] when any triangle was projected to — the caller chooses whether the [code]distance[/code] is close enough via its own threshold.

members.member: Source mesh. Surface 0 is ingested; other surfaces are ignored. Indexed and non-indexed array meshes are both supported.
Patch identifier returned in projection results. Matches the [CassieSurfaceConstraint.patch_id] convention.
World-space transform of the patch. Project queries take world-space points; the transform's inverse is applied to take the query into mesh-local space, and the result is transformed back.
